function.name: fetch_webpage
function.description: Fetch a webpage from a URL and extract its main content as clean Markdown using Crawl4AI's HTTP-only crawler (no browser) with structure-preserving HTML-to-Markdown conversion. Crawl4AI is the only fetch path: a URL it cannot fetch or extract is reported as a failure (the collect loop then moves on to another result). Returns the extracted Markdown text plus metadata such as title and final URL.

timeout_sec.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds. A hard outer bound of timeout_sec + 15s is also applied to the Crawl4AI path.

max_chars.description: Maximum number of characters to keep from the extracted Markdown text. If omitted, uses VERITAS_FETCH_MAX_CHARS or 25000. Raw HTML is archived separately for provenance and is not truncated.
